title: Writesonic Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for everyday Writesonic commands and tips.

commands.description: Provides a list of creative blog post ideas.
commands.scenario: When you're stuck on what to write about next.

commands.description: Simplifies complex text for better understanding.
commands.scenario: When a text is too complex for your audience.

commands.description: Condenses text into three main points.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick summary of a document.

commands.description: Creates an engaging headline for your content.
commands.scenario: When you need an attention-grabbing title.

commands.description: Generates a compelling product description.
commands.scenario: When you need to describe a product for a listing.

commands.description: Crafts a post for social media platforms.
commands.scenario: When you need to engage your audience on social media.

commands.command: Expand this into a full article
commands.description: Transforms a brief idea into a detailed article.
commands.scenario: When you have a topic but need more content.

commands.description: Creates frequently asked questions for a topic.
commands.scenario: When you need to address common customer queries.

commands.description: Translates text from English to Spanish.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate with a Spanish-speaking audience.

commands.description: Generates content for an email marketing campaign.
commands.scenario: When you need to reach out to customers via email.

commands.description: Creates a professional press release document.
commands.scenario: When announcing a new product or service.

commands.description: Crafts a professional bio for LinkedIn.
Generates a script for video content.
Provides a list of SEO keywords for content.
commands.scenario: When optimizing content for search engines.

commands.description: Adjust the emotional resonance and personality of your text to match a specific brand voice.

commands.command: Create a comparison table between [Product A] and [Product B]
commands.description: Transform unstructured data or feature lists into a clean, organized markdown table.

commands.command: Act as a [Persona, e.g., Marketing Expert] and critique this text
commands.description: Use role-prompting to receive constructive feedback and suggestions for improvement from a specific perspective.

commands.command: Turn this text into a step-by-step tutorial
commands.description: Convert long-form prose or messy notes into a structured, instructional guide with numbered steps.
Identify potential weaknesses or opposing viewpoints in your writing to strengthen your logic.

commands.command: Extract actionable takeaways from this transcript/text
commands.description: Identify and list specific tasks, deadlines, or lessons learned from a long piece of content.

commands.command: Create a 7-day content calendar based on [Topic]
commands.description: Generate a structured weekly schedule of post ideas to maintain consistent social media presence.

commands.command: Rewrite this text for a [Specific Platform, e.g., Instagram/Twitter] audience
commands.description: Optimize the formatting, length, and style specifically for the nuances of a particular social network.

commands.command: Generate a list of 'Hook' variations for this intro
commands.description: Create multiple attention-grabbing opening sentences to test which one performs best.

commands.command: Convert this article into a newsletter format
commands.description: Transform long-form content into a digestible, engaging email newsletter layout with a subject line.
